creator: nick@foobar.org
text:
eh, right.  Not sure why patches won't apply cleanly.  Can you pull a fresh 
copy of 2.10.9 into a directory called "phplist.old", clean out all junk 
files (rm -rf *~ files/*~ work/) from the updated port and then run the 
following command:

# diff -bNur phplist.old phplist

This should give you a usable patch file.

Nick
